check_content_excerpt:
Verify the macOS system is configured to limit consecutive failed login attempts to three with the following command:

/usr/bin/pwpolicy -getaccountpolicies 2> /dev/null | /usr/bin/tail +2 | /usr/bin/xmllint --xpath '//dict/key[text()="policyAttributeMaximumFailedAuthentications"]/following-sibling::integer[1]/text()' - | /usr/bin/awk '{ if ($1 <= 3) {print "yes"} else {print "no"}}' | /usr/bin/uniq

If the result is not "yes", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the macOS system to limit consecutive failed login attempts to three by installing the "com.apple.mobiledevice.passwordpolicy" configuration profile.
title: The macOS system must limit consecutive failed login attempts to three.
